prompt: Create an ultra-realistic cinematic editorial photograph titled “Deep Work in Nature” featuring a focused Black male professional in his early 30s working alone in the middle of a vast lush green meadow. The subject sits on one simple black folding camping chair, positioned in the lower center of the frame, wearing a tailored navy blue business suit, white dress shirt, dark tie, black shoes, and eyeglasses. He has over-ear silver and white headphones on and is quietly writing in one open notebook or planner held across his lap with one pen, looking downward in deep concentration. Surround him with tall wet grass in the foreground, rolling meadow hills in the midground, and a soft blurred forested valley in the background, with one pale winding dirt path disappearing into the distance. Include one large leafy tree canopy entering from the upper right, its branches framing the scene. Use moody natural overcast light, rich greens, shallow depth of field, cinematic compression from a telephoto lens, realistic texture, subtle bokeh, soft background blur, and a calm contemplative editorial mood. Vertical 4:5 composition, eye-level to slightly elevated perspective, subject small against the expansive landscape, no text, no logos, no extra people, no buildings, no devices other than the notebook and headphones.
